storyBeat: 四歲孔融 + 七兄弟 — 父親拿一盤梨回來

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
本節新單字 (左中右英):
🔑 boy = 男孩
🔑 young = 年輕的
🔑 pear = 梨
🔑 plate = 盤子
背熟這 4 個字,故事就會輕鬆聽懂。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Long ago in China, there lived a boy named Kong Rong.
questions.explanationZh: 很久以前,在中國,有一個小男孩,名字叫孔融。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He was four years old and the youngest of seven brothers.
questions.question: How many brothers did Kong Rong have at home?
questions.explanationZh: 「youngest of seven」——七兄弟中最小,那上面就有六個哥哥!答案是「六個哥哥」!
questions.sentenceZh: 他四歲,是七個兄弟中最小的。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The house was warm and the brothers waited at the table.
questions.questionEn: Was this a calm and warm family moment?
questions.explanationZh: 「屋裡溫暖 + 兄弟等著」——一幅安靜溫馨的家庭畫面,答案是 Yes!
questions.sentenceZh: 屋裡暖暖的,兄弟們在桌邊等著。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: One evening, their father came home with a plate of pears.
questions.explanationZh: 一天傍晚,父親帶了一盤梨子回家。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The plate had big pears and small pears on it.
questions.question: What was on the plate?
questions.explanationZh: 「big pears and small pears」——大的小的都有,就是「不同大小的梨子」!
questions.sentenceZh: 盤子上有大梨也有小梨。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: All the brothers came near to look at the plate.
questions.explanationZh: 所有兄弟都靠過來看那盤梨子。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Their eyes went straight to the biggest pear of all.
questions.question: What did the brothers look at first?
questions.explanationZh: 「eyes to the biggest」——眼睛都盯著那顆最大的梨!選「其中一個最大的梨子」!
questions.sentenceZh: 他們的眼睛直直看向最大的那顆梨。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: But no one reached out to take a pear yet.
questions.explanationZh: 但還沒有人伸手拿梨子。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: How did the room feel before anyone picked a pear?
questions.question: How did the room feel?
questions.explanationZh: 溫暖家庭 + 靜靜等待——是「好奇又安靜」的小期待!
questions.sentenceZh: 在任何人拿梨之前,房間裡是什麼感覺?

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Seven boys. One plate of pears. Who would pick first...
questions.explanationZh: 七個男孩,一盤梨子。誰會先選呢……

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match each Chinese word to its English meaning.
questions.explanationZh: 🔑 年紀最小 = youngest｜🔑 兄弟 = brother｜🔑 父親 = father｜🔑 盤子 = plate。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Long ago in China, there lived a boy named Kong Rong.
questions.sentenceZh: 很久以前,在中國,有一個小男孩,名字叫孔融。
questions.question: Which story is this?
questions.explanationZh: 故事說「有一個小男孩,名字叫孔融」——當然是孔融!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He was four years old and the youngest of seven brothers.
questions.sentenceZh: 他四歲,是七個兄弟中最小的。
questions.questionEn: Was Kong Rong the oldest of the brothers?
questions.explanationZh: 他是「最小的」——不是最大的!答案是 No!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: One evening, their father came home with a plate of pears.
questions.sentenceZh: 一天傍晚,父親帶了一盤梨子回家。
questions.question: What did the father bring home?
questions.explanationZh: 「帶了一盤梨子回家」——父親帶回來的是梨子!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The house was warm and the brothers waited at the table.
questions.sentenceZh: 屋裡暖暖的,兄弟們在桌邊等著。
questions.question: Which emoji shows a warm family scene?
questions.explanationZh: 「屋裡暖暖的」——就是溫暖舒適的家庭氣氛!🏠

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He was four years old and the youngest of seven brothers.
questions.sentenceZh: 他四歲,是七個兄弟中最小的。
questions.questionEn: Did Kong Rong have more than five brothers in all?
questions.explanationZh: 七個兄弟裡他是最小——所以總共有六個哥哥!六 > 五,答案是 Yes!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The plate had big pears and small pears on it.
questions.sentenceZh: 盤子裡有大梨子也有小梨子。
questions.question: What could Kong Rong see on the plate?
questions.explanationZh: 「大梨子也有小梨子」——大小都有,就是「有大有小的梨子」!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Long ago in China, there ___ a boy named Kong Rong.
questions.sentenceZh: 很久以前,在中國,___一個小男孩叫孔融。
questions.question: Choose the correct verb form.
questions.explanationZh: 「Long ago」是「很久以前」,所以要用過去式「lived」!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: One evening, their father came home with a plate of pears.
questions.sentenceZh: 一天傍晚,父親帶了一盤梨子回家。
questions.questionEn: Did the father come home in the morning?
questions.explanationZh: 課文說「傍晚」回家——不是早上!答案是 No!

storyBeat: 父親說:「你先選一個」 — 大家看著孔融

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
本節新單字 (左中右英):
🔑 table = 桌子
🔑 kind = 親切
🔑 smile = 微笑
🔑 pick = 選
背熟這 4 個字,故事就會輕鬆聽懂。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The father put the plate down on the family table.
questions.explanationZh: 父親把盤子放到家裡的桌上。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He looked at little Kong Rong and gave a kind smile.
questions.question: How did the father look at Kong Rong?
options: in a soft and kind way
questions.explanationZh: 「kind smile」——溫柔又親切的笑,就是「溫柔親切地」!
questions.sentenceZh: 他看著小孔融,給了一個親切的微笑。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The father turned to the smallest child before the others.
questions.questionEn: Did the father want the youngest to choose first?
questions.explanationZh: 「轉向最小的 + 在其他人之前」——就是讓最小的先選!答案是 Yes!
questions.sentenceZh: 父親在其他人之前先轉向最小的孩子。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "You are the youngest. You may pick first," he said.
questions.explanationZh: 「你最小,你可以先選,」他說。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He told Kong Rong he could choose any pear he liked.
questions.question: What did the father tell Kong Rong?
options: any one of the pears was his choice
questions.explanationZh: 「choose any pear」——哪一顆都可以選!選「哪一顆都可以選」!
questions.sentenceZh: 他告訴孔融,哪一顆梨他都可以選。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: All six brothers turned their heads to watch.
questions.explanationZh: 六個哥哥都轉頭看著他。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Twelve eyes were now on little Kong Rong.
questions.question: Who was watching Kong Rong now?
questions.explanationZh: 「12 隻眼睛」——六個哥哥各兩隻眼,12 ÷ 2 = 6,就是「所有哥哥」都在看!
questions.sentenceZh: 現在有十二隻眼睛都看著小孔融。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: No one spoke. The room waited for him to move.
questions.explanationZh: 沒有人說話。房間等著他動作。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: How would a four-year-old feel with all eyes on him?
questions.question: How would Kong Rong feel?
questions.explanationZh: 所有人安靜等著他——有點害羞、但腦袋也在轉,就是「有點害羞但在想」!
questions.sentenceZh: 一個四歲的小孩,被那麼多人看著,會有什麼感覺?

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Big pears and small pears were waiting on the plate...
questions.explanationZh: 盤子上,大梨和小梨都在等著……

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match each Chinese word to its English meaning.
questions.explanationZh: 🔑 先 = first｜🔑 選 = pick｜🔑 看著 = watch｜🔑 等著 = wait。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Father smiled and told Kong Rong to pick a pear first.
questions.sentenceZh: 父親微笑著叫孔融先選一個梨。
questions.question: What did the father tell Kong Rong to do?
questions.explanationZh: 「叫孔融先選一個梨」——父親讓孔融先選!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: All six older brothers watched and waited.
questions.sentenceZh: 六個哥哥全都看著、等著。
questions.questionEn: Were the brothers paying attention to what Kong Rong would do?
questions.explanationZh: 「看著、等著」——哥哥們都在注意孔融的選擇!答案是 Yes!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: All six older brothers watched and waited.
questions.sentenceZh: 六個哥哥全都看著、等著。
questions.question: How did the brothers react when Kong Rong was choosing?
questions.explanationZh: 「看著、等著」——哥哥們安靜看著孔融選!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Father smiled and told Kong Rong to pick a pear first.
questions.sentenceZh: 父親微笑著叫孔融先選一個梨。
questions.question: Which emoji shows a father smiling kindly?
questions.explanationZh: 「父親微笑著」——就是溫柔慈祥的笑!😊

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Father smiled and told Kong Rong to pick a pear first.
questions.sentenceZh: 父親微笑著叫孔融先選一個梨。
questions.questionEn: Did the father look angry when he spoke to Kong Rong?
questions.explanationZh: 父親是「微笑著」說的——不生氣,很溫柔!答案是 No!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The plate had big pears and small pears on it.
questions.sentenceZh: 盤子裡有大梨子也有小梨子。
questions.question: Why was the plate interesting to look at?
questions.explanationZh: 「大梨子也有小梨子」——有兩種大小的梨子,很特別!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: All six older brothers watched and waited.
questions.sentenceZh: 六個哥哥全都看著、等著。
questions.questionEn: Did some brothers leave before Kong Rong chose?
questions.explanationZh: 「全都看著」——每個哥哥都在!沒有人先離開。答案是 No!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Father smiled and told Kong Rong to pick a pear first.
questions.sentenceZh: 父親微笑著叫孔融先選一個梨。
questions.question: Why might the father let the youngest pick first?
options: brothers told him to do so
it was a kind thing to do
questions.explanationZh: 讓最小的先選——這是父親的溫柔和體貼!

storyBeat: 大梨小梨並排 — 該選哪個?

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
本節新單字 (左中右英):
🔑 big = 大的
🔑 small = 小的
🔑 sweet = 甜
🔑 thin = 瘦
背熟這 4 個字,故事就會輕鬆聽懂。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Big pears and small pears sat side by side.
questions.explanationZh: 大梨和小梨並排放著。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: One pear was the biggest of all. It looked very sweet.
questions.question: What was special about the biggest pear?
questions.explanationZh: 「looked very sweet」——看起來好吃的樣子!選「好吃的樣子」!
questions.sentenceZh: 有一顆最大的梨。看起來非常甜。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: One pear was the smallest. It looked a bit thin.
questions.questionEn: Did the smallest pear look as nice as the biggest?
questions.explanationZh: 「最小的看起來瘦」——跟最大最甜的比起來,當然沒那麼好!答案是 No!
questions.sentenceZh: 有一顆最小的梨。看起來有點瘦瘦的。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Kong Rong looked at the pears for a long moment.
questions.explanationZh: 孔融看著梨子,看了好久。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: His small face was quiet but his eyes were full of thought.
questions.question: What was Kong Rong doing while he looked?
questions.explanationZh: 「眼裡充滿思考」——他在「仔細思考」呢,小腦袋在認真想!
questions.sentenceZh: 他小小的臉安安靜靜,但眼睛裡滿是思緒。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: A four-year-old usually picks the biggest and sweetest.
questions.explanationZh: 四歲的小孩通常會選最大最甜的。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The brothers waited to see Kong Rong grab the big one.
questions.question: What did the brothers expect to see?
options: a quick walk out of the room
a hand going to the biggest pear
a long song at the table
questions.explanationZh: 「哥哥們等著看他拿大的」——大家都以為他會「手伸向最大的梨」!
questions.sentenceZh: 哥哥們等著看孔融去拿那顆大梨。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: But Kong Rong did not move fast like other small kids.
questions.explanationZh: 但孔融沒有像其他小孩那樣動得快。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: What kind of moment was this for Kong Rong?
questions.question: What kind of moment?
questions.explanationZh: 他沒有像其他小孩那樣馬上搶——這是一個「困難但安靜的選擇」的時刻!
questions.sentenceZh: 這對孔融來說是什麼樣的時刻?

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Then his small hand began to move toward the plate...
questions.explanationZh: 然後,他的小手開始伸向盤子……

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match each Chinese word to its English meaning.
questions.explanationZh: 🔑 大 = big｜🔑 小 = small｜🔑 停下來 = pause｜🔑 想 = think。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Kong Rong looked at the big pears and the small pears.
questions.sentenceZh: 孔融看著大梨子和小梨子。
questions.question: What was Kong Rong looking at?
questions.explanationZh: 「看著大梨子和小梨子」——他在看大小不同的梨子!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He paused for a moment and began to think.
questions.sentenceZh: 他停了一下,開始想。
questions.questionEn: Did Kong Rong pick a pear right away without thinking?
questions.explanationZh: 他「停下來想」——不是馬上選,他先思考了一下!答案是 No!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He paused for a moment and began to think.
questions.sentenceZh: 他停了一下,開始想。
questions.question: What does Kong Rong's pause tell us about him?
questions.explanationZh: 選之前先停下來想——這說明他「很細心、會思考」!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He paused for a moment and began to think.
questions.sentenceZh: 他停了一下,開始想。
questions.question: Which emoji shows someone thinking carefully?
questions.explanationZh: 「停下來想」——就是 🤔 那種認真思考的表情!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Kong Rong looked at the big pears and the small pears.
questions.sentenceZh: 孔融看著大梨子和小梨子。
questions.questionEn: Were all the pears exactly the same size?
questions.explanationZh: 有大梨子也有小梨子——大小不同!答案是 No!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Kong Rong looked at the big pears and the small pears.
questions.sentenceZh: 孔融看著大梨子和小梨子。
questions.question: If you were Kong Rong, what choice did you have?
options: only one pear on the plate
big or small — a real choice
optionsZh: 大或小——真的需要做選擇
questions.explanationZh: 盤子上有大有小——這就是一個真正需要選擇的時刻!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He paused for a moment and began to think.
questions.sentenceZh: 他停了一下,開始想。
questions.questionEn: Was Kong Rong still thinking about something?
questions.explanationZh: 「開始想」——他確實在思考!答案是 Yes!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He paused for a moment and began to think.
questions.sentenceZh: 他停了一下,開始想。
questions.question: Why was this moment important in the story?
options: his choice would show his values
he forgot what pears tasted like
the pears were about to fall off
his father told him to hurry up
optionsZh: 他的選擇會看出他的心意
questions.explanationZh: 停下來想——因為這個選擇很重要,會看出他心裡怎麼想!

storyBeat: 孔融伸手選了最小的 — 父親問:「為什麼?」

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
本節新單字 (左中右英):
🔑 reach = 伸手
🔑 hand = 手
🔑 take = 拿
🔑 why = 為什麼
背熟這 4 個字,故事就會輕鬆聽懂。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Kong Rong reached out with his small hand.
questions.explanationZh: 孔融伸出他的小手。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He did not take the biggest pear.
questions.question: Which pear did Kong Rong choose?
options: he shared it with all his brothers
he chose a smaller pear instead
he asked his brother to pick
questions.explanationZh: 他沒拿最大的——那他拿了什麼?他「改拿比較小的梨」!
questions.sentenceZh: 他沒有拿最大的那顆梨。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: His brothers raised their eyebrows in soft surprise.
questions.questionEn: Did the brothers expect this choice?
questions.explanationZh: 「揚眉 + 驚訝」——完全沒料到他選小的!答案是 No,哥哥們沒預料到!
questions.sentenceZh: 他的哥哥們輕輕揚起眉毛,有點驚訝。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He picked up the smallest pear from the plate.
questions.explanationZh: 他從盤子上拿起最小的梨。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The thin little pear sat lightly in his small hand.
questions.question: Which pear did Kong Rong end up with?
questions.explanationZh: 「thin little pear」——就是那顆瘦小的梨,也就是「比較小的其中一個」!
questions.sentenceZh: 那顆瘦瘦的小梨,輕輕地落在他的小手裡。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: His father leaned forward with gentle eyes.
questions.explanationZh: 父親身體微微前傾,眼神溫柔。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "Why this one, my son?" his father asked softly.
questions.question: What did the father want to know?
options: where the mother was right now
how cold the kitchen was at night
why the dog was out in the yard
his son's reason for the small pear
questions.explanationZh: 「why this one」——父親想知道「兒子為什麼選小梨」的理由!
questions.sentenceZh: 「為什麼是這一顆,兒子?」父親輕聲問。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The room was quiet. Everyone waited for the small boy.
questions.explanationZh: 房間很安靜。大家都等著小男孩開口。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: What did everyone want to hear from Kong Rong?
questions.question: What did they want to hear?
questions.explanationZh: 大家都安靜等著他開口——當然是等「他的理由」啦!
questions.sentenceZh: 大家都想聽孔融說什麼?

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Kong Rong took a small breath and began to speak...
questions.explanationZh: 孔融輕輕吸了一口氣,開始說話……

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match each Chinese word to its English meaning.
questions.explanationZh: 🔑 最小的 = smallest｜🔑 伸出手 = reach out｜🔑 為什麼 = why｜🔑 問 = ask。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Kong Rong reached out and took the smallest pear.
questions.sentenceZh: 孔融伸出手,拿了最小的梨。
questions.question: Which pear did Kong Rong choose?
questions.explanationZh: 「拿了最小的梨」——他選了最小的那一個!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Kong Rong reached out and took the smallest pear.
questions.sentenceZh: 孔融伸出手,拿了最小的梨。
questions.questionEn: Did Kong Rong choose the biggest pear for himself?
questions.explanationZh: 他選了「最小的」——不是最大的!答案是 No!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: His father looked at him and asked, 'Why did you take the small one?'
questions.sentenceZh: 父親看著他問:「你為什麼拿小的?」
questions.question: What did the father want to know?
options: why he chose the small pear
questions.explanationZh: 父親問「為什麼拿小的」——他想知道孔融選小梨的理由!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Kong Rong reached out and took the smallest pear.
questions.sentenceZh: 孔融伸出手,拿了最小的梨。
questions.question: Which emoji shows choosing the smallest thing?
questions.explanationZh: 選最小的——就像選了 🫐 這個小小的東西一樣!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: His father looked at him and asked, 'Why did you take the small one?'
questions.sentenceZh: 父親看著他問:「你為什麼拿小的?」
questions.questionEn: Did the father ask Kong Rong a question?
questions.explanationZh: 父親問了「為什麼拿小的」——當然有問問題!答案是 Yes!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Kong Rong reached out and took the smallest pear.
questions.sentenceZh: 孔融伸出手,拿了最小的梨。
questions.question: What does Kong Rong's choice tell us about him?
questions.explanationZh: 選最小的留大的給哥哥——這說明他「先想到別人」!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Kong Rong reached out and ___ the smallest pear.
questions.sentenceZh: 孔融伸出手,___了最小的梨。
questions.question: Choose the correct verb form.
questions.explanationZh: 故事是過去發生的,用過去式!「took」是 take 的過去式。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Kong Rong reached out and took the smallest pear.
questions.sentenceZh: 孔融伸出手,拿了最小的梨。
questions.questionEn: Was Kong Rong being selfish when he chose his pear?
questions.explanationZh: 他選了最小的給自己——這是為別人著想,不是自私!答案是 No!

storyBeat: 孔融說:「我年紀小,應該吃小的」 — 父親微笑

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
本節新單字 (左中右英):
🔑 hold = 握
🔑 family = 家人
🔑 should = 應該
🔑 warm = 溫暖的
背熟這 4 個字,故事就會輕鬆聽懂。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Kong Rong held the small pear in his hands.
questions.explanationZh: 孔融把小梨握在手裡。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: His voice was small but very clear in the room.
questions.question: How did Kong Rong speak?
questions.explanationZh: 「small but clear」——聲音雖小,卻聽得一清二楚!選「安靜但聽得清楚」!
questions.sentenceZh: 他的聲音很小,但在房間裡聽得清清楚楚。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: His face was calm. He did not look afraid at all.
questions.questionEn: Was Kong Rong nervous to share his reason?
questions.explanationZh: 「平靜 + 不害怕」——這樣怎麼會緊張呢?答案是 No,他不緊張!
questions.sentenceZh: 他的表情很平靜。一點都不害怕。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "I am the youngest in our family," he said.
questions.explanationZh: 「我是家裡最小的,」他說。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "I should take the small one, not the big one."
questions.question: What did Kong Rong say he should take?
options: no pear at all for himself today
two big pears just for himself
the small pear, not the big one
questions.explanationZh: 「small one, not the big」——小的留給自己,就是「小的,不是大的」!
questions.sentenceZh: 「我應該拿小的,不是大的。」

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: His father smiled a warm smile back at him.
questions.explanationZh: 父親回給他一個溫暖的微笑。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Something warm moved inside his father's chest.
questions.question: How did the father feel inside?
questions.explanationZh: 「warm moved inside chest」——心裡暖暖的,就是「溫暖又感動」的滋味!
questions.sentenceZh: 父親心裡有一股暖流。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: But his father wanted to hear one more thing.
questions.explanationZh: 但父親還想聽一件事。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: How did the father feel about his small son?
questions.question: How did the father feel?
questions.explanationZh: 溫暖微笑、心裡感動——這就是「驕傲又感動」的爸爸心情!
questions.sentenceZh: 父親看著小兒子,心裡是什麼感受?

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The father leaned closer. "And one more question, son..."
questions.explanationZh: 父親靠近一點。「再問你一個問題,兒子……」

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match each Chinese word to its English meaning.
questions.explanationZh: 🔑 最小 = youngest｜🔑 應該 = should｜🔑 微笑 = smile｜🔑 回答 = answer。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Kong Rong said, 'I am the youngest. I should take the small one.'
questions.sentenceZh: 孔融說:「我是最小的,應該拿小的。」
questions.question: What reason did Kong Rong give for taking the small pear?
questions.explanationZh: 「我是最小的,應該拿小的」——因為他是最小的!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Kong Rong said, 'I am the youngest. I should take the small one.'
questions.sentenceZh: 孔融說:「我是最小的,應該拿小的。」
questions.questionEn: Did Kong Rong think the youngest child deserves the biggest pear?
questions.explanationZh: 他說「應該拿小的」——他覺得小的才是適合自己的!答案是 No!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Father was surprised and pleased. He smiled.
questions.sentenceZh: 父親又驚訝又高興。他微笑了。
questions.question: How did the father feel about Kong Rong's answer?
questions.explanationZh: 「又驚訝又高興,他微笑了」——父親既驚訝又開心!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Father was surprised and pleased. He smiled.
questions.sentenceZh: 父親又驚訝又高興。他微笑了。
questions.question: Which emoji shows being surprised and happy?
questions.explanationZh: 「又驚訝又高興」——就是那個 😮 驚喜的表情!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Father was surprised and pleased. He smiled.
questions.sentenceZh: 父親又驚訝又高興。他微笑了。
questions.questionEn: Was the father unhappy with Kong Rong's words?
questions.explanationZh: 父親「又高興又微笑」——他很開心,不是不高興!答案是 No!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Kong Rong said, 'I am the youngest. I should take the small one.'
questions.sentenceZh: 孔融說:「我是最小的,應該拿小的。」
questions.question: What value does Kong Rong's answer show?
questions.explanationZh: 「我是最小的,應該拿小的」——這就是「把別人放在自己前面」的精神!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Father was surprised and pleased. He smiled.
questions.sentenceZh: 父親又驚訝又高興。他微笑了。
questions.questionEn: Did the father already know what Kong Rong would say?
questions.explanationZh: 父親「驚訝」——說明他沒料到這個答案!答案是 No!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Father was surprised and pleased. He smiled.
questions.sentenceZh: 父親又驚訝又高興。他微笑了。
questions.question: Why was the father pleased?
options: the pear Kong Rong chose was best
Kong Rong showed he cared for others
Kong Rong made the father laugh
optionsZh: 孔融表現出他在乎別人
questions.explanationZh: 孔融的答案顯示他懂得關心別人——這讓父親既驚訝又高興!

storyBeat: 父親問:「那你哥哥呢?」 — 孔融再答一層

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
本節新單字 (左中右英):
🔑 soft = 輕柔的
🔑 voice = 聲音
🔑 older = 較大的
🔑 think = 想
背熟這 4 個字,故事就會輕鬆聽懂。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The father asked again with a soft voice.
questions.explanationZh: 父親再次用輕柔的聲音問。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: His voice was gentle, like he was teaching a lesson.
questions.question: How did the father ask the next question?
questions.explanationZh: 「gentle like teaching」——溫柔像老師問問題,選「溫柔像老師」!
questions.sentenceZh: 他的語氣溫柔,像在教一堂課。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The father wanted to know if his son had thought even more.
questions.questionEn: Was the father testing how deep Kong Rong's thinking went?
questions.explanationZh: 「想知道有沒有想更深」——就是在測試思考深度!答案是 Yes!
questions.sentenceZh: 父親想知道兒子有沒有想更深一層。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "And what about your six older brothers?"
questions.explanationZh: 「那你六個哥哥呢?」

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The father wanted to know what Kong Rong thought about them.
questions.question: What did the father ask about now?
questions.explanationZh: 「about your brothers」——父親問的是「哥哥們」的事!
questions.sentenceZh: 父親想知道孔融對他們的想法。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Kong Rong thought for a moment and looked up.
questions.explanationZh: 孔融想了一下,抬起頭。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He did not need much time to find the words.
questions.question: How long did Kong Rong need to think?
questions.explanationZh: 「不需要太多時間」——答案找得快,就是「不太久」!
questions.sentenceZh: 他不需要太多時間就找到了要說的話。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He gave a simple and clear answer.
questions.explanationZh: 他給了一個簡單清楚的答案。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: What kind of answer was Kong Rong about to give?
questions.question: What kind of answer?
questions.explanationZh: 「簡單清楚 + 父親像老師」——就是「簡單但有智慧」的答案!
questions.sentenceZh: 孔融即將給出什麼樣的答案?

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The whole family leaned in to hear what he would say...
questions.explanationZh: 全家人靠過來,想聽他要說什麼……

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match each Chinese word to its English meaning.
questions.explanationZh: 🔑 哥哥 = older brother｜🔑 比我大 = bigger than me｜🔑 再想想 = think again｜🔑 點頭 = nod。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Father asked, 'And what about your older brothers?'
questions.sentenceZh: 父親問:「那你的哥哥們呢?」
questions.question: What did the father ask about next?
questions.explanationZh: 父親問「哥哥們呢」——想知道孔融怎麼想到哥哥!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Father asked, 'And what about your older brothers?'
questions.sentenceZh: 父親問:「那你的哥哥們呢?」
questions.questionEn: Was the father finished asking questions after the first answer?
questions.explanationZh: 父親繼續問「哥哥們呢」——還沒問完!答案是 No!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Kong Rong paused for just a moment, then looked up.
questions.sentenceZh: 孔融只停了一下,然後抬起頭來。
questions.question: What did Kong Rong do before answering the second question?
options: asked for more time to think
questions.explanationZh: 「停了一下,然後抬起頭」——他先想了想再回答!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Kong Rong paused for just a moment, then looked up.
questions.sentenceZh: 孔融只停了一下,然後抬起頭來。
questions.question: Which emoji shows someone looking up with confidence?
questions.explanationZh: 「抬起頭來」——就是那個充滿自信的抬頭動作!😊

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Kong Rong paused for just a moment, then looked up.
questions.sentenceZh: 孔融只停了一下,然後抬起頭來。
questions.questionEn: Did Kong Rong take a very long time to think before answering?
questions.explanationZh: 「只停了一下」——停得很短!不是很久。答案是 No!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Father asked, 'And what about your older brothers?'
questions.sentenceZh: 父親問:「那你的哥哥們呢?」
questions.question: Why did the father bring up the older brothers?
options: he wanted more pears for himself
the brothers asked him to speak
he was testing Kong Rong's thinking
he forgot who was in the room
questions.explanationZh: 父親繼續追問——就是想「考驗孔融的想法」有多深!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Father asked, 'And what about your older brothers?'
questions.sentenceZh: 父親問:「那你的哥哥們呢?」
questions.questionEn: Did the father's question involve the older brothers?
questions.explanationZh: 父親問「哥哥們呢」——當然有提到哥哥!答案是 Yes!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Kong Rong paused for just a moment, then looked up.
questions.sentenceZh: 孔融只停了一下,然後抬起頭來。
questions.question: What does the short pause tell us?
questions.explanationZh: 「只停了一下」——說明他想得很快,準備好就開口了!

storyBeat: 「哥哥比我大,應該吃大的」 — 全家學到一課

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
本節新單字 (左中右英):
🔑 bigger = 更大
🔑 than = 比
🔑 happy = 開心的
🔑 learn = 學
背熟這 4 個字,故事就會輕鬆聽懂。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "My brothers are bigger than me," Kong Rong said.
questions.explanationZh: 「我哥哥比我大,」孔融說。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He pointed at himself and then at his older brothers.
questions.question: What did Kong Rong compare?
options: the size of bodies in the family
a pair of warm winter shoes
questions.explanationZh: 「指自己再指哥哥」——在比較「家裡人的身材大小」!
questions.sentenceZh: 他先指著自己,再指著哥哥們。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: His logic was simple. Bigger bodies need bigger pears.
questions.questionEn: Was Kong Rong's reason easy for a child to understand?
questions.explanationZh: 「simple logic + child-friendly」——邏輯這麼簡單,小孩當然懂!答案是 Yes!
questions.sentenceZh: 他的邏輯很簡單。較大的身體需要較大的梨。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "They should take the big pears, not me."
questions.explanationZh: 「他們應該拿大的梨,不是我。」

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The small boy gave the big pears to his older brothers.
questions.question: What was Kong Rong saying in two lines together?
options: all the pears are mine alone
big ones for the older, small one for me
no one should eat any pears
pears are only for the parents
questions.explanationZh: 把兩句合起來:哥哥大要吃大的,我小要吃小的——就是「大的給哥哥,小的給我」!
questions.sentenceZh: 小男孩把大梨讓給哥哥們。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The father was so happy he could not speak.
questions.explanationZh: 父親開心到說不出話。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: His eyes were bright. He put a hand on Kong Rong's head.
questions.question: How did the father show his feeling?
options: with bright eyes and a soft touch
questions.explanationZh: 「bright eyes + hand on head」——眼睛亮起來、輕輕拍頭,就是「眼睛發亮,輕拍頭」!
questions.sentenceZh: 他的眼睛發亮。他把手放在孔融頭上。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: That night the family learned a small but big lesson.
questions.explanationZh: 那晚,全家學到一個小小但很大的功課。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: What did the family learn that night?
questions.question: What did they learn?
questions.explanationZh: 孔融把大梨讓給哥哥——這就是「跟家人分享」、體貼的精神!
questions.sentenceZh: 那晚,全家學到了什麼?

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Long after that night, the story was told again and again...
questions.explanationZh: 那晚之後很久,這個故事還是一遍又一遍地被傳下去……

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match each Chinese word to its English meaning.
questions.explanationZh: 🔑 比我大 = older than me｜🔑 大的 = the big one｜🔑 記住 = remember｜🔑 家人 = family。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Kong Rong said, 'My brothers are older. They should have the big pears.'
questions.sentenceZh: 孔融說:「我的哥哥們比我大,他們應該拿大的梨。」
questions.question: What did Kong Rong say about his brothers?
questions.explanationZh: 「哥哥比我大,應該拿大的梨」——孔融覺得哥哥值得有大梨!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Kong Rong said, 'My brothers are older. They should have the big pears.'
questions.sentenceZh: 孔融說:「我的哥哥們比我大,他們應該拿大的梨。」
questions.questionEn: Did Kong Rong think his brothers should get the small pears?
questions.explanationZh: 他說「哥哥應該拿大的」——不是小的!答案是 No!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: That day, the whole family learned a lesson from a four-year-old boy.
questions.sentenceZh: 那一天,整個家庭從一個四歲的小孩身上學到了一課。
questions.question: Who taught the lesson that day?
questions.explanationZh: 「從一個四歲的小孩身上學到了一課」——老師是孔融!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: People still tell this story today to remember Kong Rong's kindness.
questions.sentenceZh: 直到今天,人們仍然講這個故事來記住孔融的善心。
questions.question: Which emoji shows kindness and sharing?
questions.explanationZh: 孔融的善心就是「與別人分享」——🤝 就是那種精神!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: That day, the whole family learned a lesson from a four-year-old boy.
questions.sentenceZh: 那一天,整個家庭從一個四歲的小孩身上學到了一課。
questions.questionEn: Did only Kong Rong learn something that day?
questions.explanationZh: 「整個家庭」都學到了——不是只有孔融一個人!答案是 No!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Kong Rong said, 'My brothers are older. They should have the big pears.'
questions.sentenceZh: 孔融說:「我的哥哥們比我大,他們應該拿大的梨。」
questions.question: What is the main idea behind Kong Rong's reasoning?
options: respect for those older than you
optionsZh: 年紀大的人需要更多食物
questions.explanationZh: 「比我大,應該拿大的」——這背後的精神是「尊重比自己年長的人」!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: People still tell this story today to remember Kong Rong's kindness.
questions.sentenceZh: 直到今天,人們仍然講這個故事來記住孔融的善心。
questions.questionEn: Has this story been forgotten over time?
questions.explanationZh: 「仍然在說」——人們還在講這個故事,完全沒有被忘記!答案是 No!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: That day, the whole family learned a lesson from a four-year-old boy.
questions.sentenceZh: 那一天,整個家庭從一個四歲的小孩身上學到了一課。
questions.question: What lesson did the family learn?
options: care for others and be kind
questions.explanationZh: 孔融用行動說明「關心別人、有善心」——這就是全家學到的一課!
